use_cases: Displaying progress metrics on SaaS dashboards
Showing completion percentages in task or project tracking interfaces
Visualizing analytics data with color-coded thresholds
Representing skill levels or health metrics in gamified applications
Indicating upload/download progress in file transfer interfaces
ai_summary: A customizable circular SVG gauge component with configurable size variants (tiny to large) and dynamic color theming based on value thresholds. Features a primary-arc design with customizable arc priority modes and optional value display, making it ideal for dashboard metrics, progress tracking, and analytics visualizations in SaaS and fintech applications.
